h1: 9 Stylish Planking and Fireplace Combinations We Love
h2: Before and After: From No Character to Cozy
How to Get the Modern Farmhouse Living Room Look

paragraphs: Blame it on our “Fixer Upper” addiction or nostalgia for fun times spent in grandpa’s basement, but we have gone gaga for fireplace surrounds featuring planking. With an endless array of material options, it’s no surprise this treatment works with virtually any interior style, from farmhouse to coastal to minimalist-modern and everything in between.

Whether you’re tackling one wall weekend-warrior style, making over an entire room or planning details for a brand-new home, these planked fireplace walls are sure to get the creative juices flowing. One note of caution: Fireplace combustible clearances vary, so be sure to consult your local fireplace dealer to stay safe.
Horizontal enameled shiplap, a reclaimed wood mantle and slate fireplace surround lends this quaint cottage big “stay awhile” vibes.
Soothing sea-green paneling adds a coastal air to this bedroom fireplace feature.
Large grey-washed paneling pairs perfectly with this generously proportioned gas hearth.
Not ready to take the full plunge into paneling? This bedroom fireplace installation shows that even a small sliver of natural tongue-and-groove can add plenty of architectural interest and warmth.
Chevron shiplap draws the eye up, highlighting this new-school farmhouse’s vaulted ceilings, while the stone fireplace anchors the space.

Proving once again that black, white and wood can work in harmony, this contemporary living room also illustrates how keeping knick-knacks to a minimum can give a space with a lot going on (Full planked wall! TV! Fireplace!) a serene feel.
We never would’ve guessed these distressed planks were actually thin wood adhesives!
This is not your momma’s pallet craft, but we love this reclaimed build-out plus fireplace pairing all the same.
Crisp white shiplap adds a pop of home-y texture to this traditionally appointed living room.
Feeling inspired to start a fireplace remodeling project of your own? Connect with a local authorized dealer no-obligation consultation.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

Big interiors need a big fireplace. The True gas fireplace sets the standard in a traditional masonry style. Warm up the good times with the largest view in its class and serious heat. Truly extraordinary.

For a sleek fit with distinctive style, the SlimLine Fusion modern gas fireplace gives you endless options. Create your look with a blend of 10 modern and traditional elements to fill your space with a glow.

Enjoy a sophisticated fire at a smaller footprint, thanks to the sleek design of the Cosmo gas linear fireplace. Personalize the look with a range of fronts, log sets and interior options. Heat management makes it safe to install your TV above the fireplace, with just mere inches in between. Available in 32, 36 and 42-inch widths.

Evoke an open-hearth experience so real, friends may ask to add another log to the fire. We pioneered the open gas fireplace with a large, glass-free view so you get the ultimate combination of authenticity and innovation. Mild heat settings allow for openness without feeling overheated, and you can even stream your tunes or the crackling of a fire through built-in Bluetooth speakers. Not available in Canada.

With the modern design of the Allusion Platinum, you can easily create a cozy atmosphere with an optional build-out kit or wall-mount kit, or enjoy a built-in, flush design installed by pros. Use this electric fireplace year-round, with or without heat. Available in 50-inch, 60-inch, and 72-inch fireplace widths.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

The Modern version of 6K/8K Series—the best-selling gas fireplace in its category—fits your vibe with clean look in a class by itself. A bigger view, trend-forward design, voice control and heat management are at home in any décor.
Give your fireplace surround a major makeover with tile. From warm and inviting colors to mix-and-match patterns, the possibilities are endless.
A young Minnesota family adds personality and warmth with a budget-friendly living room remodel.
See how one interior designer makes her client’s modern farmhouse dreams come true, putting fireplaces center stage in living rooms of every size.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
